title: Change in Frasers Logistics & Commercial Asset Management Pte. Ltd's position in Frasers Logistics & Commercial Trust
body: Frasers Logistics & Commercial Asset Management Pte. Ltd executed a transaction for 5,247,119.0 shares of Frasers Logistics & Commercial Trust. This increases their holdings from 18,248,132.0 to 23,495,251.0 shares.
holder_name: Frasers Logistics & Commercial Asset Management Pte. Ltd
